# ResumeRig

> AI-powered resume translator that re-engineers your experience for every job you target, finds the hiring manager on LinkedIn, and drafts your outreach pitch.

ResumeRig (resumerig.ai) helps job seekers align their resume to specific job descriptions using a methodology called "Domain Alignment." It generates ATS-optimized resumes, cover letters, and outreach messages.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Resume translator, ATS scoring, cover letter and outreach generation.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the ResumeRig team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms and conditions of use.
